title: vicinia ciliata
intro: Vicinia ciliata, also known as the hairy vicinia or hairy Vicinia, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae, commonly found in tropical Africa. Vicinia ciliata has been traditionally used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used to aid in wound healing and digestion. Vicinia ciliata can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, or as a tincture by mixing the plant material with a solvent.
